ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_stops" (
  "bus_stop_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bus stop */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the bus stop */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the bus stop */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the object */,
  "stop_number" INTEGER /* Stop number of the bus stop */,
  "ltar" TEXT /* LTAR value */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the bus stop */,
  "accessible" TEXT /* Accessibility information of the bus stop */,
  "bus_pad_id" TEXT /* Bus pad ID associated with the bus stop */,
  "fdmid" INTEGER /* FDMID value */,
  "fcode" TEXT /* Feature code */,
  "source" TEXT /* Data source */,
  "sacc" TEXT /* Spatial accuracy code */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the bus stop was added */,
  "stop_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop type */,
  "is_terminal" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bus stop is a terminal */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Description of available amenities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the bus stop information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stops_stop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_type_id") REFERENCES bus_stop_types ("bus_stop_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stops_bus_pad_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_pad_id") REFERENCES bus_stop_types ("bus_stop_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_stop_types" (
  "bus_stop_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus stop type */,
  "bus_stop_type" TEXT /* Name of the bus stop type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bus stop type */,
  "is_terminal" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bus stop type is a terminal */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bus stop type is accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_stop_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the route in kilometers */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the route in km/h */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the route information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_stop_routes" (
  "bus_stop_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus stop-route pair */,
  "bus_stop_id" TEXT /* ID of the bus stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the bus stop in the route */,
  "distance_from_start" REAL /* Distance of the bus stop from the start of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time at the bus stop */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the bus stop-route information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_stop_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stop_routes_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stop_routes_bus_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("bus_stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the schedule */,
  "days_of_week" TEXT /* Days of the week the schedule is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buses" (
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus */,
  "bus_number" TEXT /* Number of the bus */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the bus */,
  "bus_type" TEXT /* Type of bus */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the bus information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_assignments" (
  "bus_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus assignment */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the bus */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the driver's shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the driver's shift */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the bus assignment information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_assignments_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_assignments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the driver */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the driver information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
